document.title: MI63-03302A SHEET-GF FRONT DECO DIVIDE 승인원

sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval and inspection package for SHEET-GF FRONT DECO DIVIDE part MI63-03302A applied to model F4335-AW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval, quality inspection, process control, reliability testing, hazardous substance inspection, and packaging recyclability declaration for the supplied component.
keyPoints: Document code and SEC code are MI63-03302A, with description SHEET-GF FRONT DECO DIVIDE.
Applied model is F4335-AW and vendor/manufacturer is Hansung P&I / ㈜한성피앤아이.
Approval review conclusion states 승인 함 and 판정 합격.
Dimensional specification is width 455.60 mm and length/height 379.60 mm with ±0.3 mm tolerance.
Material is identified as PC EMBO / PC SHEET, and adhesive tape specification ST-9108 is listed.
Reliability testing for high temperature and high humidity reported Pass.
Hazardous substance inspection uses XRF and references Samsung hazardous substance criteria.
Packaging recyclability final grade is 우수.

entities.name: Samsung Electronics Co.
entities.evidence: This is the asset of Samsung Electronics Co. and it is prohibited from copying and application without permission.

evidence.claim: The approval package identifies document code MI63-03302A and revision status 승인.
The component description is SHEET-GF FRONT DECO DIVIDE.
The applied model for the component is F4335-AW.
The approval date is 2022-09-29.
EC history records Rev. 00 as 신규 승인 on 2022-09-29.
The approval review conclusion is approved and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 결   론,  승 인 함,,,    판   정,합 격

evidence.claim: The nominal dimensions are 455.60 mm by 379.60 mm with ±0.3 mm tolerance.
The material is listed as PC EMBO 0.125T in the inspection criteria.
The adhesive tape specification is ST-9108.
Adhesion performance recorded 1,300 gf/in against a criterion of at least 1100 gf/in.
The reliability test purpose was high temperature and high humidity testing and the judgment result was Pass.
The reliability test specification used 50℃, 95% humidity, and 24 hr duration.
The reliability test period is recorded as 2022-09-20 to 2022-09-25.
The process quality control plan document number is HS18-0814-03-PQCP.
PQCP Date(Rev.) is 2019-01-04 (ver 01).
The inspection method references DUQ1-0022K for part quality assurance work rules.
The part must not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
evidence.evidenceText: This parts should not contain any substances which are specified in 00Q2-0083K

evidence.claim: Hazardous substance inspection is performed according to Samsung Electronics hazardous substance management criteria.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is general and the source does not identify a governmental regulator or jurisdiction; Samsung Electronics Co. is treated as the controlling/customer authority only because it appears in the source.
The source is an Excel-derived combined text containing multiple attached sheets and dates, including approval date, PQCP revision date, reliability test period, and work procedure revision date.
Product signal mentions HAD/A/F 1417-1717, but the source text itself identifies model F4335-AW.
